positive: A vibrant, minimalist depiction of a whimsical forest gathering. Focus on stylized silhouette art: various animal companions (fox, owl, deer, rabbit) interacting playfully among oversized, abstract flora (mushroom caps, fern fronds, weeping willow branches). Use bold, saturated jewel tones (sapphire blue, emerald green, amethyst purple) contrasted with stark white negative space. The composition should be circular and highly symmetrical, centered on a glowing nexus point. Clean lines, graphic novel style, vector art aesthetic, suitable for screen printing, high contrast, perfect for apparel print, cinematic lighting, isolated on solid background.
negative: photorealistic, hyperdetailed, noise, blurry, grainy, text, signature, logo, watermark, poor anatomy, extra limbs, abstract, messy, realistic, grayscale, muted colors, bad quality
